commit_message:
atop_resolver: Fix handshaking and other bugs atop_resolver: Fix handshaking and other bugs The current implementation of the `atop_resolver` has issues with handshake signal dependencies and relying on the module connected to its master port to always respond in the next cycle. Both of those issues violate the OBI specification and can cause the module to deadlock. These issues and other smaller fixes are addressed in this PR.

Major Issues fixed:
- When the `RegisterAmo` parameter is set to
